chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْحُبِّ فِي اللَّهِ وَ الْبُغْضِ فِي اللَّهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 60 – The love regarding Allah<sup>azwj</sup> and the hatred regarding Allah<sup>azwj</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/259)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/259)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الْحُبِّ وَ الْبُغْضِ أَ مِنَ الْإِيمَانِ هُوَ فَقَالَ وَ هَلِ الْإِيمَانُ إِلَّا الْحُبُّ وَ الْبُغْضُ ثُمَّ تَلَا هَذِهِ الْآيَةَ حَبَّبَ إِلَيْكُمُ الْإِيمانَ وَ زَيَّنَهُ فِي قُلُوبِكُمْ وَ كَرَّهَ إِلَيْكُمُ الْكُفْرَ وَ الْفُسُوقَ وَ الْعِصْيانَ أُولئِكَ هُمُ الرَّاشِدُونَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Hammad, from Hareyz, from Fuzayl Bin Yasaar who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullahasws about the love and the hatred, are these from the Emān?’ So heasws said: ‘And is the Emān anything but the love and the hatred?’ Then heasws recited these Verses [49:7] but Allah has endeared the Eman to you and has Adorned it in your hearts, and He has made hateful to you the unbelief and transgression and disobedience; these it is that are the followers of a right way’.
en.sarwar: 5. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Hammad from Hariz from Fudayl ibnYasar who has said the following: “I asked abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) ‘Are love and hate part of belief?’ The Imam asked, ‘Is belief anything but love and hate?’ He then read the words of Allah, ‘. . . But Allah has endeared belief to you and has made it attractive to your hearts. He has made disbelief, evil deeds and disobedience hateful to you. Such people will have the right guidance.’” [49:7]
